name: GPM Metals Inc.
summary: GPM Metals Inc., together with its subsidiaries, operates as a junior mineral exploration company. The company explores for lead, zinc, and silver deposits. It holds interests in Walker Gossan Project covering an area of approximately 176,000 hectares located in the McArthur Basin Mining District, Australia; and 100% interests in the Rory claim group consisting of 40 staked claims located in the Yukon Territory, Canada. The company was formerly known as Guyana Precious Metals Inc. and changed its name to GPM Metals Inc. in August 2013. GPM Metals Inc. was incorporated in 1994 and is headquartered in Toronto, Canada.
